explanation: Generated from published research artifacts only. Nodes are papers/preprints/workshop papers; edges indicate shared research metadata.

nodes.label: Mutation Search
nodes.fullTitle: Looking for (Genomic) Needles in a Haystack: Sparsity-Driven Search for Identifying Correlated Genetic Mutations in Cancer
nodes.venue: IEEE International Parallel & Distributed Processing Symposium (IPDPS)
nodes.summary: Uses sparsity-driven pruned depth-first search to make multi-hit cancer mutation search feasible at large scale.
nodes.abstract: Uses sparsity-driven pruned depth-first search to make multi-hit cancer mutation search feasible at large scale.
nodes.authors: R Prabhu, E Vatai, B Moussad, E Jeannot, R Anandakrishnan, W Feng, M Wahib

nodes.label: ResearchBot
nodes.fullTitle: ResearchBot: Bridging the Gap between Academic Research and Practical Programming Communities
nodes.venue: IEEE/ACM International Workshop on Bots in Software Engineering (BotSE)
nodes.summary: Builds a modular bot that retrieves and summarizes academic papers to answer practical software-engineering questions.
nodes.abstract: Builds a modular bot that retrieves and summarizes academic papers to answer practical software-engineering questions.
nodes.authors: S Farzanepour, S Rajeev, H Liang, R Prabhu, C Brown

nodes.label: Arrow / MPI
nodes.fullTitle: Balancing Performance and Productivity: A Comparative Study of Apache Arrow vs. MPI
nodes.venue: 2025 IEEE High Performance Extreme Computing Conference (HPEC), 1–7
nodes.summary: Compares MPI/C, MPI/Python, and Python-based Apache Arrow implementations to study performance, scalability, and developer productivity tradeoffs.
nodes.abstract: Compares MPI/C, MPI/Python, and Python-based Apache Arrow implementations to study performance, scalability, and developer productivity tradeoffs.

nodes.label: CT Enhancement
nodes.fullTitle: Improved 2-D Chest CT Image Enhancement with Multi-Level VGG Loss
nodes.venue: IEEE Transactions on Radiation and Plasma Medical Sciences 9(3), 304–312
nodes.summary: Uses multi-level VGG loss to improve low-dose chest CT image enhancement for clearer diagnostic images.
nodes.abstract: Uses multi-level VGG loss to improve low-dose chest CT image enhancement for clearer diagnostic images.
nodes.authors: A Chaturvedi, R Prabhu, M Yadav, WC Feng, G Cao

nodes.label: SparkLeBLAST
nodes.fullTitle: On the Scalability of Computing Genomic Diversity Using SparkLeBLAST: A Feasibility Study
nodes.venue: 2024 IEEE High Performance Extreme Computing Conference (HPEC), 1–8
nodes.summary: Models and evaluates SparkLeBLAST scalability for COVID-19 genomic diversity analysis on Fugaku-scale systems.
nodes.abstract: Models and evaluates SparkLeBLAST scalability for COVID-19 genomic diversity analysis on Fugaku-scale systems.
nodes.authors: R Prabhu, B Moussad, K Youssef, E Vatai, W Feng

nodes.label: Interactive Projections
nodes.fullTitle: Explainable Interactive Projections for Image Data
nodes.summary: Combines interactive dimensionality reduction with visual explanations so users can reshape and understand image projections.
nodes.abstract: Combines interactive dimensionality reduction with visual explanations so users can reshape and understand image projections.
nodes.authors: H Han, R Faust, BFK Norambuena, R Prabhu, T Smith, S Li, C North

nodes.label: Plant Phenotypes
nodes.fullTitle: Interactive Deep Learning for Sorting Plant Images by Visual Phenotypes
nodes.summary: Uses Andromeda to let domain experts sort plant images by visual phenotype through interactive deep learning.
nodes.abstract: Uses Andromeda to let domain experts sort plant images by visual phenotype through interactive deep learning.
nodes.authors: H Han, R Prabhu, T Smith, K Dhakal, X Wei, S Li, C North
